programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: When a punk robs the wrong place knowing that the people who run it will come after him so he turns to his old friend Huggy Bear to make things right with them Huggy calls the boss who tells him to just return it But his friend tells his girlfriend what happened but she wants the money and it turns out shes seeing someone else so they kill him and take the money from Huggy Bear leaving him holding the bag So Huggy turns to Starsky and Hutch for help

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke falls for a airplane racer in danger

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan is turned into a servant of the devil and the only hope he has is a young girl who believes in Gods love

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repos theyve ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers Then Lou Sonia and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel And finally Matt and Froy cant seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full Little do our guys know that she was right all along

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froys business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck Then Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent And with Matt and Froys business in a complete shambles they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: Lights of Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: In this musical western Marjorie Brooks Dale Evans is the owner and operator of a rodeo thats an antiquated touring company on its last legs Her business rival Frank Madden Richard Powers offers to combine their operations if the lovely Marjorie will be his bride Though she initially rebuffs his proposal a canceled booking tips the scales and forces Marjorie to accept But rodeo rider Roy Rogers Roy Rogers suspects Frank is behind Marjories troubles and sets out to investigate

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder Mark believing the boys claim of innocence hides him until he can find the real killer

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E10 The Hunger
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E10 The Hunger

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: SPOILERS The Cartwrights challenge an arrogant and cruel British prizefighter the Duke and his alcoholic manager to a bout with John Heenan the Benicia Boy after the Cartwrights meek friend JD gets pulverized by the Duke in a bar-fight JD is adored by saloon girl Marge but he has been too shy to return her affections While the Cartwrights wait to see if Heenan will actually take the bout and come from San Francisco the Duke pursues Marge and assaults her when she rebuffs him When the manager comes to Marges rescue he too is beaten up by the Duke who it turns out is the managers brother Infuriated by all this Hoss Cartwright himself challenges the Duke and knocks him out in the fourth round of a bare-knuckle fight refereed by Sheriff Roy Coffee The Duke and his brother-manager reconcile in the humility of defeat then learn that the Benicia Boy will accept the proposed bout but only the Duke comes to San Francisco The Duke apologizes to all he has offended while in Virginia City and heads west to fight Heenan

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Black clad men clamber over each other and up a wall to a high window entering the United States Mint at Carson City They plant a bomb and leave without taking any of the money Jim West and Artemus Gordon must learn why they have broken in and who masterminded the plot before economic chaos overtakes the United States

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A young man accidentally kills the driver of a Jeep that Kimble is riding in Kimble gets away but is later captured by Lt Gerard in a remote cabin But the real danger is from the boys father who is determined to protect his son no matter what

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Nelson is hired to study shark behavior at various depths and the effects of a new shark repellentIn Caribbean waters and with two other divers assisting himhe is lowered in a shark cage to accomplish the assignmentBefore it is all over Mike is reminded that human beings also pose a danger to his life

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Nelsonbrought to the Latin American port of Santa Puebloinvestigates a recently found German WWII submarineThe subwhich had been on a secret missionmay contain secret documents or weaponsthe remains of top Nazi Party members-or gold! Hard hat divers backed by the countrys dictator interfere in the exploration

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A lieutenant terrified of combat crashes at take-off killing his copilot and a thieving Sgt agrees to cover it up but later demands he desert with him to a neutral country

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The death of a model recalls for Nick his own infatuation with a beautiful ballerina one hundred years ago

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan search for a cursed scarecrow that may be responsible for murder

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A prisoner George De La Pena is due for parole after serving time in prison only to be haunted by his past before his release Meanwhile the prison warden John Milford tests an illegal drug for his own personal gain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A housewife stressed out by her husbands reckless behavior welcomes an elderly cosmetics saleswoman in to her home Only to discover that the old hag has another more devious motive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: hen funeral director Ezra Thornberry gets his very polite young nephew Bobby as a roommate he eventually learns his rude harsh behavior towards him could be fatal

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve some secret plans that are sewn into a dress according to a model

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: Hogans 304
programme.desc: Hogans 304

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Complications develop when McHale and the 73 crew go after a Japanese pilot known as Washing Machine Charlie who has been attacking the Taratupa base on a daily basis

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton suspects McHale and the 73 Crew of consorting with the enemy when a Japanese radio announcer broadcasts personal details about Binghamton that only someone close to him would know

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carters mission

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate pointedly tells Luke that he is welcome to go fishing with Grandpa and Mac Maginnis and to do whatever he wishes for several nights thereafter but Grandpa steps in to make amends when he realizes that Lukes freedom is causing a genuine strain on their still-young marriage

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The Farmers Association is having its fall dance and Grandpa doesnt want to take Flora MacMichael until Little Luke tells him about the box supper that Flora is bringing

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve something from a member of the Russian womens swim team but cant remember her name

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joanna is bound to convince Dick and Stephanie that a man and a woman can be just friends after a professor asks her out after attending his poetry night

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A meteor crashes onto the island The Professor soon concludes that the meteors cosmic rays are accelerating the aging process on the island and that the castaways will die of old age in one week

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Griff and Ryan investigate a series of vicious murders which were committed by a half-human half-fish woman known as Silver Eyes who is looking to procreate with a man

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone and Marquette must find James Pike a mysterious escaped serial killer who rose from the dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren have finally learned the identities of the Blackwood team They use it to their advantage by creating doubles framing them for an armed bank robbery where several people were shot dead Malzor impersonates a city police officer and joins in the manhunt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing encounters Falco who has come to kill Dr Arcane for turning him from a bird into a man

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A vessel of alien pacifists bound for Earth lands on the moon They are greeted as friends by all- except Commissioner Simmons who sees their vessel as way to return home

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 215
programme.desc: Hercules 215

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While plutonium is stolen from a nuclear plant Boone is is having a tough time concentrating His mind is on Elyse Chapel a famous musician and old flame

programme.title: The Streetrs of San Francisco
programme.desc: A sniper is randomly shooting people in a high-rise building and threatens to continue doing it until he is paid a million dollars Stone and Keller try to identify and stop the assailant but Stone believes the methods of the acting captain in charge of the investigation are wrong for the situation

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollins sent to investigate the case of a beautiful Latin American spy whos suddenly started acting suspiciously the IM force must find out if shes still on the right side - or if shes losing her sanity

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: The Fugitive S04E08
programme.desc: The Fugitive S04E08

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath risks his life and saves a man who is a notorious hired gunman The irony is the killer has a contract to kill Heath put out by a local rancher with a grudge

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The wife of a prison inmate is shot and killed in a laundromat in what looks like a professional hit Stone and Keller determine that it was the work of a prison gang that is using outside enforcers to force inmates wives to help them smuggle drugs into the prison Another wife of a prisoner is now targeted to be made to do what the murdered woman would not

programme.title: Music Scene
programme.desc: Santa Rosa Official Music Video by Zac Dunlap Band Cham and Bounty Killer, Cory North, Pigtails, Sami Thompson, Jim Stanard, Sarah Darling, Ready, Steady, Die!,"

programme.title: Digital Man
programme.desc: An out-of-control robot is inadvertently set loose in a small community and a crack squad of soldiers are sent to hunt it down Gradually the members of the squad begin to suspect that some of them are robots

programme.title: Gamera War of the Monsters
programme.desc: Prehistoric monster Gamera returns to wreak havoc on Japan American version of the classic kaiju film Gamera vs Barugon

programme.title: Timerider The Adventure of Lyle Swann
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Lyle Swann Fred Ward is cruising through the Mexican desert when he accidentally stumbles into a time-travel experiment and finds himself transported back to the Old West of the 1870s There he encounters an attractive local woman Belinda Bauer and a gang of criminals led by Porter Reese Peter Coyote Lyles motorized bike is impressive in the past -- until it runs out of gas Now Lyle must rely on his wits to take care of business and return to his own time

programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jason Bryant as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview

programme.desc: Meet one of the original members of the hit group The 5th Dimension The lovely Ms Florence La Rue stops by the show

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimbys new super computer replaces Gadget leaving him to pursue an alternative career

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD are planning to steal a precious formula that could end world famine

programme.title: Go Bots
programme.desc: Go Bots

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill flees to Earth in the wake of his failed coup

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Pride intercepts a message to Saw Boss declaring the Planet Kyros deadly to Monster Minds A weapon there turns everything to crystal Jayce leads everyone to the planet to find this weapon; but upon landing he discovers it is a trap

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Following Audrics signal the Lightning League enters the Pirates Guild zone commanded by the pirate queen Morgana an old love of Hercs The Pride is boarded robbed and Herc and Oon are taken prisoners Jayce Gillian and Flora follow them concealed by an invisible bubble Saw Boss is given Oon as his share of the loot but he recognizes him and insists upon having Jayce Morgana reluctantly attempts to force Herc to tell of Jayces whereabouts but then she changes sides and fights Saw Boss Jayce rescues Herc and Morgana and she gives up her pirating ways to fight Monster Minds
